topic.title: Mid-Semester TRACE Survey Evaluation Completion - Extra Credit
topic.text:
Mid-Semester TRACE Survey Evaluation Completion - Extra Credit

Points: 25

Due Date: February 14th, 2026 at 11:59 PM

Assignment Overview

Complete the official Mid-semester TRACE evaluation for INFO 7375: Branding & AI to earn 25 extra credit points. Your honest feedback helps improve this course and develop the Madison Framework tools for future students.

Instructions

  1. Watch for the TRACE email (available through February 9 - 13)
    • Check your Northeastern email for the official TRACE invitation
    • The email will contain a direct link to your evaluation
  2. Complete the evaluation thoughtfully
    • Provide honest, constructive feedback
    • Reflect on your learning experience
    • Remember: your responses are anonymous
  3. Capture proof of completion
    • After submitting the evaluation, take a screenshot of the confirmation/completion page
    • The screenshot should show "Evaluation Completed" or similar confirmation message
    • DO NOT include any of your actual responses or written feedback in the screenshot
  4. Submit your screenshot here
    • Upload your completion screenshot as a JPG, PNG, or PDF file
    • File naming convention: LastName_FirstName_TRACE.jpg (or .png/.pdf)

Important Notes

  • You cannot edit your evaluation once submitted, so complete it thoughtfully
  • This is a one-time submission - you cannot resubmit once you've uploaded your screenshot
  • Your actual evaluation responses remain completely anonymous and confidential

Grading

This is an all-or-nothing assignment:

  • 25 points for a valid completion screenshot submitted by the deadline
  • 0 points for no submission or invalid screenshot

Why This Matters

Your feedback directly influences how we evolve this course, refine assignments, and develop new AI tools for brand strategy. As Creative Engineers and Full Stack Creatives, your perspective on balancing technical and creative learning is invaluable.

Questions?
